title: GSC Stale Data Guardrail — Phase 20.7
principle: If GSC data is stale, the daily run MUST NOT execute SEO changes. Block, report, do not deploy.

staleness_checks.description: Date range (startDate, endDate) is identical to the previous production day's pull
MD5 checksum of page-level rows matches previous day without documented explanation (e.g., weekend/holiday with genuinely no change)
pulled_at field is missing or empty
cache_used field is true or truth file source is not from a fresh API call
gsc-api-truth-current.json does not exist or was created >24 hours ago
row count is 0 but status is not GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE
startDate has not advanced vs previous production day (should advance by ~1 day per day, accounting for GSC delay)

exception_process.weekend_holiday: If date range and checksum are identical because GSC has no new data on weekends/holidays, this is ALLOWED but must be documented with explanation.
exception_process.documentation_required: Explain WHY data hasn't changed (e.g., 'Saturday — GSC does not update on weekends').

integration: This guardrail runs as STEP 0 in Phase 19 daily loop, BEFORE any SEO action.
